nodes.desc: Transform kitchen scraps into nutrient-rich soil amendment.

nodes.desc: Apply chemical treatments to control pests.

nodes.desc: Implement a water-efficient irrigation system that delivers water directly to plant roots.

nodes.label: We should protect biodiversity
nodes.desc: A diverse ecosystem supports resilience and productivity.

nodes.label: We should avoid harmful chemicals
nodes.desc: Chemical pesticides can harm beneficial insects and contaminate soil.

nodes.label: We should preserve water
nodes.desc: Water is a finite resource essential for plant growth.

nodes.label: We should have fast productivity
nodes.desc: Sustainable farming practices can enhance productivity while minimizing environmental impact.

nodes.label: We should have high selling flowers
nodes.desc: Growing popular flower varieties can increase sales and profitability.
